title: ricinocarpus subvillosus
intro: Ricinocarpus subvillosus is a plant species that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae and is also known as the hairy ricinocarp. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus subvillosus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ricinocarpus subvillosus can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
